creator: david@conrock-software.se
text:
(In reply to Stefan Grundmann from comment #2)
Thank you Stefan! I ran with your patch while building the erlang-runtime26 port with WX enabled and it worked like a charm!

My system is running on 
13.3-RELEASE-p5
with wx
3.2.4

Writing to confirm and potentially helping others to find that this makes it possible run for example :observer in runtime26.
